name: New Moon
themes: Quiet reset, clarifying motives, committing to internal alignment.
guidance: Slow down and reset. Listen to your body and choose one clear intention instead of many goals.
human_text: This is a good moment for a quiet reset: clarify your motives and commit to internal alignment. Slow down and reset. Listen to your body and choose one clear intention instead of many goals.

name: Waxing Crescent
themes: Take first micro-actions, share drafts, invite accountability.
guidance: Take small first steps, but don't rush to show everything yet. Let ideas grow before sharing widely.
human_text: Time for first micro-actions: share drafts and invite accountability. Take small first steps, but don't rush to show everything yet. Let ideas grow before sharing widely.

name: First Quarter
themes: Hit resistance that demands refinement or firmer commitment.
guidance: Notice what feels difficult or blocked. Decide whether to adjust your approach or commit more fully.
human_text: You may hit resistance that demands refinement or firmer commitment. Notice what feels difficult or blocked. Decide whether to adjust your approach or commit more fully.

name: Waxing Gibbous
themes: Fine-tuning strategy, securing resources, aligning collaborators.
guidance: Check details, expectations, and resources. Make sure everything is ready before presenting results.
human_text: This is a good moment to check details: agreements, timelines, and resources. Fine-tune your strategy, secure resources, and align collaborators. Better to refine than rush to publish.

name: Full Moon
themes: Insight arrives; truths are revealed; emotional tides peak.
guidance: Share what you've reached, acknowledge emotions, and release what no longer fits your path.
human_text: Insight arrives; truths are revealed; emotional tides peak. Share what you've reached, acknowledge emotions, and release what no longer fits your path.

name: Waning Gibbous
themes: Harvest, integration, and teaching from what surfaced.
guidance: Reflect on what worked. Write down lessons and thank people who supported you.
human_text: Harvest, integration, and learning from what has surfaced. Reflect on what worked. Write down lessons and thank people who supported you.

name: Last Quarter
guidance: Let go of unnecessary tasks and commitments. Simplify plans and remove what drains energy.
human_text: Release, restructure, simplify commitments. Let go of unnecessary tasks and commitments. Simplify plans and remove what drains energy.

name: Waning Crescent
themes: Restoration, dreams, and gestating the next cycle.
guidance: Rest more, reduce input, and avoid major decisions. Pay attention to subtle physical and emotional signals.
human_text: Restoration, dreams, and gestating the next cycle. Rest more, reduce input, and avoid major decisions. Pay attention to subtle physical and emotional signals.
